dungeon: GENUINE ROTF edited compilation ('PREVIOUS VIDEO' end card, LEGENDARY overlays) of several boss fights — Marble Colossus (built; corroborated), a 'Water Elemental' event boss, base-game Geb (Tomb of the Ancients), and a NAME-ONLY 'Soul of Decaying' enemy. Chat partly readable. Mostly CORROBORATION (Marble Colossus) + one name-only new enemy worth flagging ('Soul of Decaying' — possibly Tomb-of-Decaying-Death-related, but only its combat-overlay name was captured, no taunt/clean arena).
map: DOCUMENTED-from-bossends+frames: the MARBLE COLOSSUS lair = a grey HEXAGONAL arena with scattered pink PILLARS (blue bullet ring fills it). A 'Water Elemental' BLUE WATER arena (open water tiles). A COLOURFUL CHECKERED grid arena (green/yellow/red) where 'Soul of Decaying' is fought. A desert/sand TOMB room (Geb). Edited compilation -> arenas catalogued individually, no single layout.
